It was late, it was cold, was tired, thought "maybe not worth it" but then... 1/ There are no other const...
“highly advanced exploit by the most elite hackers on earth” they stored their seedphrases in a PASSWORD MANAGER lmao Lose it all you morons

Syndicate Replying to @syndicateio The root cause was a private key compromise. Keys were stored in a password manager accessible to a small number of people to handle chain maintenance and upgrades, without an additional encryption layer separate from the password manager. ! Below are the facts & my conclusion  RT to spread awareness Read on ... Two 20 year old NFT rugpullers getting charged with...

We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.

We’re excited to announce that Pudgy World, our free to play browser-based game, is now live. Explore 12 unique towns across The Berg, help Pengu find Polly, and play mini-games, all on . Play now: [PudgyWorld.com](https://t.co/x7lkMt8Rre)
The fox comes with benefits.  MetaMask Mobile just got an upgrade: discover tailored benefits, exclusive access, and airdrops you’re eligible for! Powered by

Introducing the MetaMask x Pudgy Penguins Soulbound Token series. These commemorative SBTs celebrate the Huddle, all crypto communities and our friends using wallet. More information and how to claim below.

There are 2 additional SBT tiers exclusively for holders. MetaMask Penguin Black SBT is claimable by Lil Pudgy or Pudgy Penguin NFT holders, while the Orange SBT is exclusive to Pudgy Penguin NFT holders. All NFTs must be held in a MetaMask wallet.

Azuki is heading to Licensing Expo Las Vegas. With a trading card game, an upcoming manga, and Shao at the heart of it all - we'll be on the floor with the world's biggest IPs. Testing a new ink and dip pens this morning. Been a while since I touched traditional medium, shaky ahh hands.  Azuki 5567 |

May the 4th be with you Quick Azuki updates  Azuki TCG US distribution live with PHD Games and GTS. Biggest LGS distributors. [Collect.anime.xyz](https://t.co/TJjc8MgDkJ) claw machine by is restocked again. New Grails added.  Azuki TCG discord tourney for new players: 29 entrants, 4+ hours of gameplay.
Azuki IP expansion is in full effect. Ask your local game store to order Azuki TCG today. Official Azuki TCG

Azuki TCG is now stocked through PHD Games and GTS Distribution. These two distributors put Magic, Pokémon, One Piece, and other major TCGs on shelves across the US. Want us at your shop on launch day? Tell your shop to preorder through PHD or GTS. To all the new players and holders joining Azuki: Welcome to the Garden
